title: eragrostis tubiformis
intro: Eragrostis tubiformis, also known as tubiform love grass, is a type of grass native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Eragrostis tubiformis include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, teas, and tinctures that can be made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
